title: astragalus lalandei
intro: Astragalus lalandei, also known as Lanzhou astragalus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help boost the immune system and reduce stress. Astragalus lalandei is typically prepared as a herbal tea or capsule and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
